title: AmartyaDas01/ai-teaching-assistant
summary: Educator-first AI teaching assistant: upload a course's notes and slides, then chat with the material (grounded, cited answers), auto-generate Bloom's Taxonomy quizzes, and track student analytics. FastAPI, LangChain, React/TypeScript, ChromaDB/Qdrant; OpenAI or local Ollama. Deployed on free tiers with a RAG eval suite and 42 tests.

title: Miosa-osa/OSA
summary: An AI agent that lives on your computer and does the work you ask for, in plain words — from writing code to running your business busywork. Local, one command, any model.

title: chipi/agentic-ai-homelab
summary: How I work with agentic AI: personal patterns, homelab infra (vLLM, Ollama, Grafana Alloy, LibreChat), project scaffolding. Not best practices - what I run.

title: sczhengyabin/llm-wrapper
summary: 一个轻量级的 LLM API 聚合网关（Rust + actix-web），类似 litellm 但更精简。多上游聚合、协议转换、参数注入、OAuth 上游接入，配备可视化 WebUI 管理。

title: EndoTheDev/OMeter
summary: Benchmark and compare Ollama models across local and cloud endpoints with rich, sortable tables.

title: repairman29/chump
summary: Self-hosted AI coding agent with persistent memory and bounded autonomy. Local-first, your keys, your data. Written in Rust.

title: backupliton98-star/ai-commander-core
summary: Kodiqa-agent 2026 - Open Source AI Coding Agent with 7 Providers & 69 Commands

title: masterkeysrd/loom
summary: Loom is a high-performance, graph-based AI workflow engine for Go. It allows you to   build complex agentic systems by defining multi-step workflows as directed graphs,   seamlessly connecting them to any large language model, and persisting execution   state for long-running or interrupted tasks.

title: K-Ananthamoorthy/plainlabs
summary: Private, offline lab-report explainer that runs on a ~2B on-device model. The model does language; deterministic code does the medicine.

title: warifmust/agenta
summary: A thin, self-hosted runtime for building, running, and observing AI agents, defined with config, not code.

title: AashishH15/Lexicon
summary: A local-first, offline AI writing assistant. Grammar, rewriting & tone entirely on your machine.

title: baiyuheniao/BaiyuAISpace2
summary: 轻量级跨平台 LLM 客户端 + AI Agent 开发环境 | Lightweight cross-platform LLM client & agent workspace (Tauri 2 + Vue 3 + Rust)

title: dev-core-busy/jarvis
summary: Self-hosted autonomous AI agent for Linux — multi-LLM, real desktop control (VNC), WhatsApp, RAG knowledge base, sandboxed security layer, OpenClaw skills

title: 1ay1/agentty
summary: AI pair programming in your terminal — one static binary, sub-ms startup, any model

title: thebardchat/thebardchat
summary: A concrete dispatch operator in Alabama building local AI for the 800M people Big Tech left behind. Faith. Family. Sobriety. Raspberry Pi 5. All local. All yours.

title: AiursoftWeb/OllamaGateway
summary: Ollama Gateway: Supercharge your native Ollama with enterprise-grade API authentication, request auditing, and virtual model management—your secure, private AI gateway.

title: PeterDessev/Shiori
summary: A Windows desktop companion for learning languages through reading: instant dictionary, conjugation analysis, FSRS spaced repetition, and difficulty-graded library. Offline-first.

title: temiroff/Blacknode
summary: A visual runtime for AI, GPU computing, and robotics, workflow framework for AI agents. MCP-native typed graphs, visual editor, Python export.

title: scian0204/AnywhereLLM
summary: Use an LLM in any focused text field on macOS via a global hotkey — without stealing focus

title: browseros-ai/BrowserOS
summary: 🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.
